settings.title: User guide
settings.text: Let’s get your started with your brand new Tracki device and find all documentation about our GPS tracker hardware and included attachments.

settings.title: FAQ
settings.text: We’ve carefully given detailed answers to some of the questions you might have. Please see our FAQ page to verify that there’s no existing answer to your question, before submitting a request or contacting us.

settings.title: Useful videos
settings.text: Watch our support videos to get insights on how best to set up your Tracki GPS tracker and accessories, in order to have the best user experience.

settings.title: Return policy
settings.text: We will always go the extra mile to ensure that you are completely satisfied with your purchase.

settings.heading: Contact support
settings.subtext: Didn't find what you're looking for?
settings.highlight_text: We're here 7-days a week to help
